title: Victorinox Outdoor Multitool — 15 Functions
short_description: Legendary Swiss multitool with 15 functions. Includes saw, blade, can opener, and corkscrew. Built to last.
long_description: The Victorinox Multitool is an essential companion for any outdoor adventure. With 15 functions — including a sharp blade, wood saw, can opener, and corkscrew — you'll be prepared for any situation. The legendary Swiss quality ensures decades of durability. Compact and lightweight, it fits in any bag.
